assertions.title: Error handling for repos without remotes

steps.expected: Backend serves git status for the no-remote repo
steps.observed: Backend restarted successfully and responded on http://localhost:3000

steps.action: Open UI at http://localhost:5173 and inspect SyncStatus
steps.expected: Branch name shown with explicit no-remote indicator
Both buttons disabled when no remote configured

evidence.network: agent-browser network capture returned no requests; fallback curl evidence: git-sync/git-no-remote/VAL-GIT-005-api-git-status-headers.txt + git-sync/git-no-remote/VAL-GIT-005-api-git-status-body.json

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture returned 'No requests captured' for this run
frictions.resolution: Collected endpoint evidence with curl headers/body output for GET /api/git/status

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-GIT-005): pass. API returned 200 with remote null, UI showed branch + no-remote indicator, Pull/Push were disabled, and no console errors were observed.
